items.title: As Elon Musk's SpaceX goes public, Australian government officials are flagging Starlink's risks
items.summary: As tens of thousands of Australians line up to buy shares in Elon Musk's SpaceX blockbuster public offering, Australian government officials are privately flagging the risks of the country's growing reliance on its satellite internet service, Starlink.

items.title: Hobart City Council resurrects plan to block whole homes from being turned into short-stay accommodation

items.title: Doug Harrison, 97, refuses to slow down after eight decades as a grazier

items.title: Queensland government considers delegating responsibility for protecting people from junk mail

items.title: People aren't moving to Tasmania anymore and that has implications for the economy
